text: OF THE MAYOR AND BOARD OF ALDERMEN
Present: Mayor Pro Temp Brad Edwardes, Alderman Robinson, Davis, Larsen, Town Attorney Charles
Grubb, Police Chief Shayne Gibson, Town Clerk Veronica Brown, Code Enforcement Officer David Searcy
Absent: Mayor Frank and Alderman Doughty
Mayor Pro Temp Edwardes called the meeting to order at 6:00 pm, Alderman Davis then led the invocation
Convene in Public Hearing: A motion was made by Alderman Davis, seconded by Alderman Robinson to
convene into a Public Hearing. The motion was carried by unanimous voice vote.
The meeting was then convened into Public Hearing:

TITLE: A RESOLUTION TO SELECT MAYOR PRO TEMPORE OF THE TOWN OF GREENWOOD,
PARISH OF CADDO, STATE OF LOUISIANA
Town Clerk, Veronica Brown read the Resolution by Title and Alderman Robinson nominated Alderman Edwardes
to remain the Mayor Pro Tempore and with no further nominations, a motion was made by Alderman Davis, seconded
by Alderman Robinson to approve the Resolution. The motion was carried by unanimous voice vote.

TITLE: A RESOLUTION AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR PRO TEMPORE TO SIGN A LETTER OF
ENGAGEMENT BETWEEN THE TOWN OF GREENWOOD AND CHAVANNE CNSULTING, LLC FOR
Town Clerk, Veronica Brown read the Resolution by title and explained that with the growth of the town and its

Town Clerk, Veronica Brown read the Resolution by Title and there was a brief discussion from the Board. A motion

1) Mr. Carter Bedford, Greenwood resident, inquired on license plate reader/trailer and wanted to know if it was
coming out of the Police Dept budget. Police Chief confirmed that it was.
2) Alderman Larsen invited everyone out to the Farmers Market on Saturdays and wanted to commend Sr.
Officer Anderson on his heroic action when presented with a young child that had injuries from a swimming
3) Ms. Arlene Jordan, Greenwood resident, inquired on Budget items and Town Clerk Veronica Brown provided
her with a copy of the approved budget. She also inquired on the salaries of the Police Officers and Police
Chief Shayne Gibson responded accordingly but affirmed that Greenwood is comparable to other
town/villages of our size and larger.
There being no further business, a motion was made by Alderman Davis and seconded by Alderman Robinson the
meeting was adjourned at 6:40 pm. Next meeting to be held on Thursday, July 15, 2021 @ 6:00 p.m. for the Work
Session of the Board of Aldermen and Monday, July 19, 2021 at 6:00 pm Public Hearing & Regular Session Meeting
of the Board of Alderman. All meetings held in the Town Hall Chambers.
s/s Veronica Brown, Town Clerk s/s Brad Edwardes, Mayor Pro Temp
